query:
ALTER TABLE timecard_daily 
  ADD COLUMN origemRegistro VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'dixi' NOT NULL AFTER obraId,
  ADD COLUMN numBatidas INT DEFAULT 0 AFTER origemRegistro,
  ADD COLUMN isInconsistente TINYINT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL AFTER numBatidas,
  ADD COLUMN inconsistenciaTipo VARCHAR(50) AFTER isInconsistente,
  ADD COLUMN resolucaoTipo VARCHAR(50) AFTER inconsistenciaTipo,
  ADD COLUMN resolucaoObs TEXT AFTER resolucaoTipo,
  ADD COLUMN resolucaoEm TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER resolucaoObs,
  ADD COLUMN resolucaoPor VARCHAR(255) AFTER resolucaoEm,
  ADD COLUMN atestadoId INT AFTER resolucaoPor,
  ADD COLUMN advertenciaId INT AFTER atestadoId,
  ADD COLUMN obraSecundariaId INT AFTER advertenciaId,
  ADD COLUMN rateioPercentual INT AFTER obraSecundariaId;
